description_long: This is a coordinated outdoor seating set consisting of two single-seater chairs and one double-seater sofa, all featuring sturdy wooden frames with dark brown finishes. The seats and backrests are fitted with thick, light blue cushions that provide comfort and contrast visually with the darker frame. Each chair and the sofa have wide, flat armrests, enhancing both comfort and the robust, modern aesthetic. The set includes a rectangular coffee table with a matching wooden finish, its surface smooth and flat, suitable for placing drinks or other items. The design is clean and geometric, with all pieces sharing the same construction style and color palette. This ensemble is ideal for urban parks, patios, or communal outdoor spaces, offering both functionality and visual appeal.
description: A modern outdoor seating set with two armchairs, a double sofa, and a matching wooden coffee table, all featuring light blue cushions and dark brown frames.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set: two armchairs, a double sofa with blue cushions, and a rectangular coffee table.
description_view_1: Angled view from above and behind, highlighting the depth of the seating and the slatted design of the table.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the sofa and chairs, as well as the full tabletop surface.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the arrangement of the seating around the table and the thickness of the cushions.
